creator: dima@Chg.RU
text:
During the build of mrtg port the default path "/usr/bin/perl" is not
changed to ${PERL}.

Fix: 

Remove space from the first line of the files above from the third position
dirung patching process.
How-To-Repeat: 
cvsup corrent ports tree;
cd /usr/ports/net/mrtg && make all install;
Look at the first line in /usr/local/bin/{mrtg, cfgmaker, indexmaker}.
